'''Crimson Squadron''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] unit stationed at [[Kiidan]] on [[Cilpar]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

Commanded by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Grode]], who also carried the rank of [[Wing Commander/Legends|wing commander]], it was tasked to protect the facilities of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Boren Tascl]] and [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Norquest]]. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] infiltrated the unit in the weeks following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and at a critical moment turned on the Imperial pilots, [[Mission to Cilpar|devastating them]].

With Crimson Squadron destroyed and the Moff's other defenses overrun by the local resistance movement, the planet fell shortly thereafter.

Other pilots in the squadron included [[Aldrich Kugel]] and [[Petro (pilot)|Petro]].
